description_long: This kiosk features a layered, rectangular structure with three main horizontal slabs, each separated by a visible gap. The top surface displays a collage of photographic images, including architectural elements and a sepia-toned portrait, giving it a visually engaging and modern appearance. Prominent black text signage is suspended between the upper layers, with phrases such as 'HERA EN PAESTUM' and repeated 'ASDASDASD' visible from different angles. The kiosk appears to be constructed primarily from solid, smooth materials, likely composite panels or stone, with a clean, geometric form. There are no visible doors or windows, and the structure is fully enclosed on all sides. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on visual communication through signage and imagery.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with layered slabs, photographic imagery on the top, and bold black text signage suspended between the layers. The structure is fully enclosed, with a minimalist and contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered slabs, photographic collage on the top, and 'HERA EN PAESTUM' signage clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the repeated 'ASDASDASD' signage and the depth of the layered structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the photographic imagery and the absence of signage, with the layered slabs prominent.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizes the collage of images and the arrangement of the signage along the side.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign, suspended between layers, with visible text 'HERA EN PAESTUM' and repeated 'ASDASDASD' on the front and side.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, solid slab, with photographic imagery on the surface.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with graphic and photographic elements.
